title: Knockback Swords (NO CIT)
description: A minecraft texturepack that changes the texture of a diamond sword when it has the knockback enchant.
body:
###  A minecraft texturepack that changes the texture of a diamond sword when it has the knockback II enchant.

 Works on any version 1.21.5+ thanks to minecraft's vanilla resourcepack features. Feel free to change the texture for your own knockback sword texture! 
 
 ![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/864fd8af6de984596b664ae7129e63032bda43e3.png)
